response.body: .view-3d-button{color:#c1c5cc;background-color:#0c0c0d8c;transition:all .2s ease-in-out}.view-3d-button:hover{color:#fff}.view-3d-button.active{color:var(--color-off-black);background-color:#e5e6ec}.view-3d-button svg:not(.hasColor) g[fill],.view-3d-button svg:not(.hasColor) rect[fill],.view-3d-button svg:not(.hasColor) path[fill]{fill:currentColor}.view-3d-button svg:not(.hasColor) g[stroke],.view-3d-button svg:not(.hasColor) rect[stroke],.view-3d-button svg:not(.hasColor) path[stroke]{stroke:currentColor}
